sample_size.source_quote: 219 (10.3%) were admitted to the ICU owing to sepsis caused by IAI according to collected data review.

patient_age_mean.source_quote: The mean age of the patients was 69.4 ± 13.1 years

antibiotic_timing_hours.source_quote: Time zero to time of antibiotics administration (min) 184.7 ± 303.0

icu_mortality_percent.source_quote: the mortality rate was 28.8% (n = 63/219) for sepsis due to IAI in the ICU.

mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: age, sex, CCI, lactic acid level
mortality_predictors.source_quote: after adjusting for age, sex, CCI, and lactic acid level, only coagulation dysfunction appeared to affect 28-day mortality significantly (OR = 2.78 [1.47–5.23], p = 0.001)

mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: CCI, septic shock, initial lactate level, initial SOFA score, CRRT, source control, number of dysfunctional organs
mortality_predictors.source_quote: In the multivariate logistic regression analysis, after adjusting for each risk and confounding factor, only the SAPS 3 score (p < 0.001) and CRRT (p < 0.001) were independently associated with higher 28-day mortality

mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: CCI, septic shock, initial lactate level, initial SOFA score, SAPS 3 score, source control, number of dysfunctional organs
mortality_predictors.source_quote: In the multivariate logistic regression analysis, after adjusting for each risk and confounding factor, only the SAPS 3 score (p < 0.001) and CRRT (p < 0.001) were independently associated with higher 28-day mortality

mortality_predictors.effect_size: OR = 9.06 (95% CI 2.64–31.15) for three organ dysfunctions; OR = 7.25 (95% CI 1.85–28.36) for four or more organ dysfunctions
mortality_predictors.source_quote: The 28-day mortality was 55.6% in patients with three organ dysfunctions (OR = 9.06 [2.64–31.15], p = 0.001) and 50% in patients with four or more organ dysfunctions (OR = 7.25 (1.85–28.36], p = 0.004).
the 28-day mortality rate was more significantly affected with coagulation (OR = 2.99 [1.63–5.48], p < 0.001)
